meta_description: o pali e sitelen pona pi nasin nimi tawa ante toki, tawa kama sona e toki, tawa pana sona pi sona toki.
meta_keywords: nasin nimi, sona toki, ante toki, kama sona e toki, sitelen nasin
meta_image_alt: lukin sin pi ilo sitelen pi nasin nimi la nimi pi toki tu li jo e linja.
input_placeholder: o sitelen e toki sin lon ni…
input_guidance: ilo li ken la, ona li kipisi e toki kepeken nasin pi toki ni. ilo li ken ala la, ona li kipisi lon weka pi nimi tu en lon sitelen pini. sina wile kipisi pona la, o kepeken {delimiter}. sama ni: {example}
input_gloss_empty: o pana e nimi la sina ken pana e toki ante.
token_editor_split_at_boundary: o tu e ijo lon ni
footer_info: sina pali e sitelen lon ilo ni la, sitelen li tan sina. ilo ni li jo ala e ona. sina ken kepeken sitelen anu pana e sitelen tawa jan ante. sina toki tawa jan ante e ilo ni la, ni li pona tawa mi.
confirm_delete_sentence: sina wile weka e toki ni anu seme?
confirm_new: sina wile pali e sitelen sin anu seme? ni li weka e ijo ale.
confirm_load_example: sina wile e nasin sona pi nimi "{name}"? sin la nimi en sitelen sina li ante.
about_tagline: ni li ilo lipu pi sitelen e nimi sama lon toki mute.
about_credit: {author} li lawa e nasin pi ilo ni. ilo ni li open lon mun nanpa luka tu wan pi sike 2022.
settings_tagline: Bring your own API key. Translations and alignments are generated directly from your browser.
settings_privacy: Your API key is stored only in this browser (localStorage) and sent directly to the chosen provider — never to our servers.
